# Objection FAQ campaign

## When to use

Use when comments/questions repeat.

## Why it works

Converts objections into content.

## Mechanism

Objections are buyer language.

## Required inputs

FAQ page, ads per objection, retargeting.

## When not to use

If objections expose product weakness.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

FAQ engagement, trial starts, sales objections.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
